lessons.title: Inheritance 🧬
lessons.description: Don't write the same code twice! Let classes inherit traits from parents.

lessons.title: Overriding ✍️
lessons.description: Change inherited behaviors to perfectly fit the child class.

lessons.title: Abstract Classes 👻
lessons.description: Create strict rules and empty templates that other classes MUST follow.

lessons.title: Mixins (Superpowers) 🦸‍♂️
lessons.description: Inject standalone abilities perfectly into any class you want.
